title: brachyrhynchos cymbalariifolius
intro: Brachyrhynchos cymbalariifolius, also known as Bupleurum chinense, is a traditional Chinese medicinal herb belonging to the family Apiaceae. It is commonly used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects, due to the presence of alkaloids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Bupleurum chinense include reducing fever and inflammation, alleviating symptoms of hepatitis and viral infections, and improving liver function. In herbal preparations, Bupleurum chinense is often used in combination with other herbs to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
